title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TIAMAN COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF BOLINSONG, MUNICIPALITY OF BONIFACIO, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL, TO EPIFANIO DE LOS SANTOS COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4039 / 59 OG No. 51, 8740 (December 23, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3767, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TIAMAN COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF BOLINSONG, MUNICIPALITY OF BONIFACIO, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL, TO EPIFANIO DE LOS SANTOS COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Tiaman Community School in the barrio of Bolinsong, Municipality of Bonifacio, Province of Misamis Occidental, is hereby changed to Epifanio de los Santos Community School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
